title: The King - Japanese Sentence Mixing Template - ALL JAPANESE SYLLABLES FOR DOWNLOAD
description:
http://www.mediafire.com/?nmzi2yzmj22 (only 1,59MB)

All standard grammar syllables. Included dakuten (ga, bi etc.) and handakuten (pa, pi...).

Yoon (ryu, kyo etc.), double consonants and prolonged vowels are absent, but really unnecessary since they are easy to make from the syllables provided.
